_meta.description: Parametric design templates for common 3D printable objects. Each template provides OpenSCAD code with customizable parameters.

phone_stand.description: Angled phone stand with adjustable cradle width, angle, and base dimensions. Prints flat, no supports needed.

hook.description: Simple wall hook with screw hole. Prints flat on back surface.

box_with_lid.description: Rectangular box with snap-fit lid. Two-piece print, no supports needed.

cable_clip.description: Adhesive-back cable clip for desk cable management. Prints flat.

shelf_bracket.description: Triangulated shelf bracket with mounting holes. Prints upright.

nameplate.description: Raised text nameplate with angled face. Prints flat, no supports.

pencil_holder.description: Cylindrical pen holder with honeycomb pattern cutouts. Prints without supports.

headphone_stand.description: Desktop headphone hanger with curved top rest. Prints in one piece.

drawer_organizer.description: Grid-based drawer organizer with customizable compartments. Prints flat.

sd_card_holder.description: Compact holder for SD and microSD cards with labeled slots.

laptop_stand_riser.description: Angled laptop riser for ergonomic typing. Two identical halves, prints flat.

coat_hook_multi.description: Wall-mounted coat rack with multiple pegs. Prints flat on back.

hinge_box.description: Box with living hinge that prints as one piece, folds to close.

funnel.description: Kitchen/workshop funnel with customizable spout and mouth sizes.

measuring_scoop.description: Kitchen scoop with flat-bottom bowl and ergonomic handle.

wall_plate_cover.description: Standard wall plate cover for light switches or outlets.

soap_dish.description: Draining soap dish with raised ridges and drain holes.

spool_holder.description: Tabletop filament spool holder with roller bearings and adjustable width.

tube_connector.description: Parametric tube coupler for joining pipes or tubes. Straight or angled.

battery_holder.description: Holder for AA, AAA, or 18650 batteries with snap-fit retention.

wrench.description: Open-ended wrench for hex bolts. Specify the bolt size.

spacer_washer.description: Flat spacer ring with configurable inner diameter, outer diameter, and thickness.

corner_brace.description: L-shaped reinforcement bracket with mounting holes for joining perpendicular surfaces.

standoff.description: Hexagonal standoff with through-hole for PCB or panel mounting.

shaft_collar.description: Clamping collar for locking position on a round shaft. Split design with bolt hole.

pcb_standoff_mount.description: Mounting plate with standoff posts for standard PCB sizes. Configurable hole spacing.

din_rail_clip.description: Snap-on DIN rail mount adapter for custom modules. Standard 35mm rail.

servo_bracket.description: L-bracket for standard hobby servo motors with mounting tabs.

sliding_lid_box.description: Box with dovetail-track sliding lid. Prints as two pieces.

stackable_bin.description: Open-top bin with interlocking lip and ledge for stable vertical stacking.

threaded_jar.description: Jar with printed screw threads and matching lid. Two-piece print.

monitor_riser_shelf.description: Desktop monitor riser that fits over a keyboard. Parametric width, depth, and height.

tablet_stand.description: Adjustable-angle tablet or e-reader stand with cable pass-through slot.

drill_bit_holder.description: Block with graduated holes for organizing drill bit sets by size.

hex_key_rack.description: Wall-mount rack with graduated slots for Allen key sets.

sanding_block.description: Ergonomic sanding block with clip grooves for sandpaper retention.

bag_clip.description: Spring-action clip for sealing food bags. Prints as one piece.

spice_jar_rack.description: Tiered step rack for uniform spice jars. Configurable jar size and count.

bottle_opener.description: Lever-style bottle cap opener with ergonomic grip.

filament_guide.description: Clip-on filament guide for printer frame extrusions. Directs filament path.

nozzle_rack.description: Small organizer block with labeled slots for spare printer nozzles.

cable_raceway_clip.description: Snap-on clip for routing cables along desk edges or walls.

cable_grommet.description: Desk pass-through ring for cable routing with snap-in cover.

gopro_mount.description: Standard GoPro 3-prong mount base with configurable attachment method.

vesa_adapter.description: Adapter plate converting between VESA 75mm and 100mm mounting patterns.

rail_clamp.description: Clamp that grips round or square rails for mounting accessories.

plant_label_stake.description: Pointed garden stake with flat label area for marking plants.

pot_drip_tray.description: Saucer/drip tray sized for specific pot diameters.

seed_spacer.description: Flat template with configurable hole grid for consistent seed spacing.

phone_vent_mount.description: Spring-grip phone holder that clips into car air vents.

fuse_puller.description: Tweezers-style tool for extracting automotive blade fuses.

corner_clamp_jig.description: Alignment jig for holding pieces at exact 90 degrees during gluing or welding.

bench_dog.description: Round bench dog peg for workbench holdfast holes.

hose_barb_adapter.description: Barbed fitting for adapting between two different hose diameters.

drain_strainer.description: Flat strainer disc with radial slot pattern for sink or floor drains.

raspberry_pi_case.description: Snap-fit enclosure for Raspberry Pi boards. Configurable for different Pi models.

switch_panel.description: Flat panel with configurable cutouts for toggle or rocker switches.

license_plate_frame.description: Custom license plate frame with adjustable border width and text area. Standard US/EU sizes.

cup_holder_insert.description: Adapter insert for oversized cup holders — reduces diameter to fit smaller cups or bottles.

p_trap_cover.description: Snap-fit cover plate for exposed P-trap pipes under sinks. Conceals plumbing cleanly.

shower_caddy_hook.description: Over-the-pipe hook for hanging shower caddies or accessories on shower pipes.

cable_chain_link.description: Parametric snap-fit cable chain link for CNC machines and 3D printers. Print multiple and snap together.

cable_wrap_guide.description: Spiral guide for neatly wrapping excess cable length. Mounts to desk or wall.

clamp_pad.description: Protective jaw pad for bench vises — prevents marring delicate workpieces.

dowel_jig.description: Self-centering dowel drilling jig for precise joint alignment. Multiple hole spacing options.

birdhouse_panel.description: Replacement front panel for birdhouses with configurable entry hole and perch.

gear_spur.description: Involute spur gear with configurable tooth count, module, and face width. For hobby robotics and mechanisms.

pulley_gt2.description: GT2 belt timing pulley for 3D printers and CNC. Configurable tooth count and bore.

z_axis_guide.description: Adjustable Z-endstop mount for 3D printer frames. Slides on 2020 extrusion.

tool_holder_pegboard.description: Customizable pegboard hook for holding tools, cables, or accessories. Standard 25mm pegboard spacing.
